rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port assumptions/guarantees, and implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE content, with type scopes for constants and equations, implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and preserve type consistency.
Use valid AGREE logical operators and syntax for guarantees and assumptions.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents in component type contracts.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions.
Equations and constants are declared with type annotations like eq name : type = expr; const name : type = value;
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
AGREE annex placement in system vs component contexts
